message:
test(term): add 23 TabStop/CharSet/MouseEncoding tests and fix screen scorecard fields

Add unit tests for TabStop (16 tests: new, find_next/prev, set, resize, clear),
CharSet (3 tests), MouseEncoding (2 tests), SavedCursor (2 tests).

Fix screen.rs scorecard_record_line_accumulates_correctly test: add missing
greedy_forced_breaks, selected_forced_breaks, line_count, estimated_states,
evaluated_states fields to MonospaceLineWrapScorecard struct literals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
